batch.description: YC batch code e.g. 'W24', 'S23', 'W25'. Null = all batches (slow).

industries.description: Filter by industry (client-side, partial match). e.g. ['B2B', 'AI', 'Healthcare']. Null = no filter.

locations.description: Filter by location string (client-side, partial match). e.g. ['San Francisco', 'New York']. Null = no filter.

status.description: Filter by company status. One of: 'Active', 'Inactive', 'Acquired', 'Public'. Null = all.

max_companies.description: Max companies to return after filtering.

include_founders.description: If true, fetches founder name, LinkedIn URL, and bio for each company via Jina Reader. Adds ~5-15s depending on company count.
